introSection: Mad Mouse was a B. A. Schiff & Associates steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Thorntown, Indiana, USA. It opened on June 29, 1985.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Wild Mouse first opened in 1978 at Shady Lake in Streetsboro, Ohio, USA.

In 1982, the park closed along the ride and later relocated to Middle Country USA and reopened in 1985 under the new name, Mad Mouse.

In 1994, the ride closed down and was later scrapped.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Blue track and yellow wooden structure supports.

fullText:
Mad Mouse was a B. A. Schiff & Associates steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Thorntown, Indiana, USA. It opened on June 29, 1985.

Wild Mouse first opened in 1978 at Shady Lake in Streetsboro, Ohio, USA.

In 1982, the park closed along the ride and later relocated to Middle Country USA and reopened in 1985 under the new name, Mad Mouse.

In 1994, the ride closed down and was later scrapped.



Blue track and yellow wooden structure supports.
